hooks.prompt: If the command just executed was a deploy, push, or release command (git push, npm publish, vercel deploy, etc.): check whether .build-loop/state.json exists and indicates an active build loop. If Phase 7 (Fact Check & Mock Scan) has NOT completed, warn: 'Build loop Phase 7 (fact-check) has not completed. Run fact-check before deploying.' Otherwise, do nothing.
